description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a white brick exterior and a prominent red-tiled gable roof over the garage section. The front yard is enclosed by a low picket fence and features a small lawn with utility boxes near the entrance. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard, surrounded by a taller privacy fence, and includes a large above-ground pool and a glass-enclosed patio or sunroom. Multiple rectangular windows are arranged in horizontal rows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The driveway leads to a double garage with two large doors, and the main entryway is understated, blending seamlessly with the facade. The overall design is clean and functional, with a focus on open outdoor spaces and practical amenities.
description: A modern two-story white brick house with a red-tiled gable roof, double garage, fenced yards, and a backyard featuring a pool and glass sunroom.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entry, picket fence, and utility boxes on a small lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the red-tiled roof, driveway, and the transition from the front yard to the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large backyard, above-ground pool, glass-enclosed patio, and privacy fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the sunroom, pool, and the side of the house with additional windows and fencing.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple flush entry with no porch, adjacent to utility boxes and a small lawn, integrated into the main facade.
